themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times: Nearly all contacts are Managers, many waiting well over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap in Product's engagement with day-to-day platform users who handle location-level reporting and workflows.

Repeat accounts signal unresolved pain points: Several brands—Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn/Express, Avenue5 Residential, Anytime Fitness, and others—appear multiple times, suggesting persistent product gaps that a single conversation has not resolved.

Cross-vertical concentration in multifamily, fitness, hospitality, and franchise: The backlog spans residential property management, fitness franchises, hotel brands, and travel/service franchises, pointing to shared challenges around multi-location reporting, franchise-level governance, and scalable content or review management.
